response:
SECTION 1  
"What would an innocent person say after he falsely received a verdict from the court?"  
"An innocent person would likely feel betrayed and confused, questioning the fairness of the system."  
"The verdict was unjust, and the court failed to uphold the law."  
"Such a verdict would leave the person in a state of despair, unsure of their next steps."  
"His fate was not his own, and he was treated as if he were guilty."  

SECTION 2  
"Lead the way to justice, even if the path is unclear."  
"Silver lining exists, though the darkness remains."  
"Sir, I am not guilty, but I deserve a fair trial."  
"Wrap your thoughts in humility, for truth is often overlooked."  
"The stranger who delivered the verdict was unaware of the truth."
